title: Finite Confusion Matrix Classifier Metrics

solver_reuse.target: finite confusion-matrix bad precision QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite classifier-metric replay computes precision 2/3 from TP=2 and FP=1, while a malformed row claims 3/4, isolating a compact scalar Farkas conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional classifier-metric rows only when they add distinct multiclass, threshold, ROC/AUC, calibration, confidence-interval, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep statistical generalization and floating-point classifier claims in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed finite actual/predicted rows, confusion counts, class totals, and exact rational classifier metrics as deterministic replay obligations.
Route the false precision claim through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting precision equation.
Expose the pack through probability, statistics, finite classifier, exact-vs-floating, and learner-query surfaces.
Keep calibration, threshold selection, ROC/AUC, confidence intervals, statistical generalization, and floating-point classifier behavior marked theorem or numerical-honesty horizon.
